diseases.description: Common under warm humid conditions causing spindle-shaped lesions and neck damage.
diseases.treatment: Use resistant varieties, improve spacing, and apply fungicide when outbreaks are severe.

diseases.description: Appears as brown lesions and weakens plant health under nutrient stress.
diseases.treatment: Correct nutrient balance and remove infected residue from the field.

diseases.description: Shows orange-brown pustules and spreads quickly under moderate moisture.
diseases.treatment: Use resistant cultivars and apply fungicides early in the season.

diseases.description: Produces elongated gray-green lesions and is favored by humid weather.
diseases.treatment: Rotate crops, improve airflow, and use fungicide where pressure is high.

diseases.description: Water-soaked dark patches often intensify during cool humid conditions.
diseases.treatment: Remove infected foliage quickly and apply disease management products as needed.

diseases.description: Forms concentric brown spots and often appears after warm wet spells.
diseases.treatment: Improve canopy management and protect the crop before symptoms expand.

diseases.description: Causes leaf browning and can become severe under extended wet weather.
diseases.treatment: Avoid dense canopy conditions and remove infected plant debris.

diseases.description: A severe leaf disease that reduces photosynthesis under humid conditions.
diseases.treatment: Use sanitation, remove infected leaves, and protect the plantation actively.
